method: Phase 1 person-swap (docs/variant-expansion/00-methodology.md); forms via verbecc, verified.

person.subtitle: You ___ (essere = to be) Italian.

explanation.es: La forma de tú de 'essere' (presente) es 'sei'.

person.subtitle: He ___ (essere = to be) Italian.

explanation.es: La forma de él/ella de 'essere' (presente) es 'è'.

person.subtitle: We ___ (essere = to be) Italian.

explanation.es: La forma de nosotros de 'essere' (presente) es 'siamo'.

person.subtitle: You (all) ___ (essere = to be) Italian.

explanation.en: The voi (you all) form of 'essere' (present) is 'siete'.
explanation.es: La forma de vosotros de 'essere' (presente) es 'siete'.

person.subtitle: They ___ (essere = to be) Italian.

explanation.es: La forma de ellos/ellas de 'essere' (presente) es 'sono'.

person.subtitle: I ___ (avere = to have) am hungry. (lit. I have hunger.)

explanation.es: La forma de yo de 'avere' (presente) es 'ho'.

person.subtitle: You ___ (avere = to have) are hungry. (lit. you have hunger.)

explanation.es: La forma de tú de 'avere' (presente) es 'hai'.

person.subtitle: He ___ (avere = to have) is hungry. (lit. he has hunger.)

explanation.es: La forma de él/ella de 'avere' (presente) es 'ha'.

person.subtitle: You (all) ___ (avere = to have) are hungry. (lit. you have hunger.)

explanation.en: The voi (you all) form of 'avere' (present) is 'avete'.
explanation.es: La forma de vosotros de 'avere' (presente) es 'avete'.

person.subtitle: They ___ (avere = to have) are hungry. (lit. they have hunger.)

explanation.es: La forma de ellos/ellas de 'avere' (presente) es 'hanno'.

person.subtitle: Tomorrow you ___ (andare = to go) will go to the beach.

explanation.es: La forma de tú de 'andare' (futuro) es 'andrai'.

person.subtitle: Tomorrow he ___ (andare = to go) will go to the beach.

explanation.es: La forma de él/ella de 'andare' (futuro) es 'andrà'.

person.subtitle: Tomorrow we ___ (andare = to go) will go to the beach.

explanation.es: La forma de nosotros de 'andare' (futuro) es 'andremo'.

person.subtitle: Tomorrow you (all) ___ (andare = to go) will go to the beach.

explanation.en: The voi (you all) form of 'andare' (future) is 'andrete'.
explanation.es: La forma de vosotros de 'andare' (futuro) es 'andrete'.

person.subtitle: Tomorrow they ___ (andare = to go) will go to the beach.

explanation.es: La forma de ellos/ellas de 'andare' (futuro) es 'andranno'.

person.base_prompt: Che tu ___ (volere) o no, si parte alle sei.
person.new_prompt: Che io ___ (volere) o no, si parte alle sei.
person.subtitle: Whether I ___ (volere = to want) like it or not, we leave at six.

explanation.en: The io (I) form of 'volere' (present subjunctive) is 'voglia'.
explanation.es: La forma de yo de 'volere' (presente de subjuntivo) es 'voglia'.

person.notes: Subjunctive person-swap (mood is fixed; only the person changes).

person.base_prompt: Che tu ___ (volere) o no, si parte alle sei.
person.new_prompt: Che lui ___ (volere) o no, si parte alle sei.
person.subtitle: Whether he ___ (volere = to want) likes it or not, we leave at six.

explanation.en: The lui/lei (he/she) form of 'volere' (present subjunctive) is 'voglia'.
explanation.es: La forma de él/ella de 'volere' (presente de subjuntivo) es 'voglia'.

person.notes: Subjunctive person-swap (mood is fixed; only the person changes).

person.new_prompt: Che noi ___ (volere) o no, si parte alle sei.
person.subtitle: Whether we ___ (volere = to want) like it or not, we leave at six.

explanation.en: The noi (we) form of 'volere' (present subjunctive) is 'vogliamo'.
explanation.es: La forma de nosotros de 'volere' (presente de subjuntivo) es 'vogliamo'.

person.notes: Subjunctive person-swap (mood is fixed; only the person changes).

skipped.reason: auxiliary-choice drill (avere vs essere) with an implied subject — pedagogy is auxiliary selection, not person.
noun subject (Maria) → 3rd-person locked (person-swap would change the meaning).
hypothetical period — the subordinate 'Se avessi' subject is fixed text, so swapping only the main verb's person creates a subject mismatch across clauses.
skipped.prompt: Se avessi tempo, ___ (viaggiare, io) di più.

skipped.reason: impersonal subject ('it was late') — no personal person axis.
skipped.prompt: Benché ___ (essere) tardi, siamo usciti lo stesso.

skipped.reason: the blank is the subordinate verb; the main clause 'ti avrei avvisato' is fixed 1sg → person mismatch.
skipped.prompt: Se lo ___ (sapere) prima, ti avrei avvisato.
